title: reel:update-outline args
description: Incrementally edit the script outline tree (scenario.outline) of the active (or specified) scenario, shown in the workbench's Outline panel. Prefer upsert/removeIds (incremental) over replace (which drops nodes you don't list). The workbench picks up the change within a few seconds (must be open to SEE it; the data is persisted regardless). Provide at least one of upsert / replace / removeIds / synopsis. Call reel:get-script-meta first to learn existing node ids.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. Defaults to the active scenario.

upsert.description: Add or update nodes. Match by id (omit id to create a new node). order is reflowed per parent automatically.

id.description: Existing node id to update; omit to create.

parentId.description: Parent node id; omit for a top-level (act) node.

title.description: Node title, e.g. '第二幕：雨夜抉择'.

order.description: Sibling sort hint; auto-reflowed if omitted.

removeIds.description: Node ids to delete. Descendants are removed too, to avoid dangling parentId.

replace.description: Replace the WHOLE outline with these nodes (drops anything not listed). Use sparingly.

synopsis.description: Optional: also set the scenario's one-line synopsis (scenario.synopsis).
